tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show system interface
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set lldp-reception enable
        set role wan
        set snmp-index 1
    next
    edit "port2"
        set vdom "root"
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set type physical
        set device-identification enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set role lan
        set snmp-index 2
    next
    edit "port3"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 3
next
    edit "port4"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 4
    next
    edit "port5"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 5
    next
    edit "port6"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 6
    next
    edit "port7"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 7
    next
    edit "port8"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
set snmp-index 8
    next
    edit "port9"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 9
    next
    edit "port10"
        set vdom "root"
        set type physical
        set snmp-index 10
    next
    edit "naf.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set src-check disable
        set snmp-index 11
    next
    edit "l2t.root"
        set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set snmp-index 12
    next
    edit "ssl.root"
set vdom "root"
        set type tunnel
        set alias "SSL VPN interface"
        set snmp-index 13
    next
    edit "fortilink"
        set vdom "root"
        set fortilink enable
        set ip 10.255.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping fabric
        set type aggregate
        set lldp-reception enable
        set lldp-transmission enable
        set snmp-index 14
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 1
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 36d3d8f8-21e2-51f1-e54f-7fcee4961af8
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "limit_icmp_out"
        set uuid 27df94a0-290c-51f1-8b64-306cac45e78a
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuHost"
        set dstaddr "ICMPTarget"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "svc-ICMP"
        set traffic-shaper "ICMP_limit"
next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "UbuntuHost_LAN"
set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
end

config firewall addrgrp
edit "UbuntuGroup"
set member "UbuntuHost" "UbuntuHost_LAN"
next
end

config firewall policy
edit 2
set srcaddr "UbuntuGroup"
next
end

show firewall policy 2
show firewall addrgrp "UbuntuGroup""}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall address

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (address) # edit "UbuntuHost_LAN"
new entry 'UbuntuHost_LAN' added

new entry 'UbuntuGroup' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuGroup) # set member "UbuntuHost" "UbuntuHost_LAN"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (UbuntuGroup) # next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (addrgrp) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # edit 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) # set srcaddr "UbuntuGroup"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy 2
config firewall policy
    edit 2
        set name "limit_icmp_out"
        set uuid 27df94a0-290c-51f1-8b64-306cac45e78a
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuGroup"
        set dstaddr "ICMPTarget"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "svc-ICMP"
        set traffic-shaper "ICMP_limit"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall addrgrp "UbuntuGroup"
config firewall addrgrp
    edit "UbuntuGroup"
        set uuid a42e4f92-290c-51f1-2443-990a68f73d50
        set member "UbuntuHost" "UbuntuHost_LAN"
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_UBU
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
exit
class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
 match access-group name ICMP_FROM_UBU
exit
policy-map ICMP_POLICE
 class ICMP_CLASS
  police 1000000 10000 10000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
 exit
exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input ICMP_POLICE
end
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1 input
show access-lists ICMP_FROM_UBU"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_UBU
 permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
 exit
class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
 match access-group name ICMP_FROM_UBU
 exit
policy-map ICMP_POLICE
 class ICMP_CLASS
  police 1000000 8000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
 exit
 exit
interface GigabitEthernet0/1
 service-policy input ICMP_POLICE
end
show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1 input
show access-lists ICMP_FROM_UBU"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#ip access-list extended ICMP_FROM_UBU
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp host 192.168.1.3 any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# exit
Switch(config)#class-map match-any ICMP_CLASS
Switch(config-cmap)# match access-group name ICMP_FROM_UBU
Switch(config-cmap)# exit
Switch(config)#policy-map ICMP_POLICE
Switch(config-pmap)# class ICMP_CLASS
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  police 1000000 8000 8000 conform-action transmit exce$00000 8000 8000 conform-action transmit excee         d-action  8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action d         rop
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)# exit
Switch(config-pmap-c)# exit
Switch(config-pmap)#interface GigabitEthernet0/1
Switch(config-if)# service-policy input ICMP_POLICE
Switch(config-if)#end
Switch#show policy-map interface GigabitEthernet0/1 input
 GigabitEthernet0/1 

  Service-policy input: ICMP_POLICE

    Class-map: ICMP_CLASS (match-any)  
      0 packets, 0 bytes
      5 minute offered rate 0000 bps, drop rate 0000 bps
      Match: access-group name ICMP_FROM_UBU
        0 packets, 0 bytes
        5 minute rate 0 bps
      police:
          cir 1000000 bps, bc 8000 bytes, be 8000 bytes
        conformed 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          transmit 
        exceeded 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          drop 
        violated 0 packets, 0 bytes; actions:
          drop 
        conformed 0000 bps, exceeded 0000 bps, violated 0000 bps

    Class-map: class-default (match-any)  
      0 packets, 0 bytes
      5 minute offered rate 0000 bps, drop rate 0000 bps
         
Switch#how access-lists ICMP_FROM_UBU
        ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch#
Switch#
